text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down roughly 2.7–2.8% over the past day, with altcoins holding up slightly better, signaling broad-based weakness rather than selective selling. The Fear & Greed index sits at extreme fear (12) and has deteriorated further over the week, while Bitcoin dominance remains elevated at 56%, suggesting investors are rotating into the perceived safety of BTC during uncertainty. Trading volume at $95B is moderate, indicating cautious participation rather than panic liquidation.
